welcome.title: Welcome to Umbrella
welcome.body: Take a quick tour to learn how to navigate your firm workspace.
welcome.b1: Find clients, matters, and billing in seconds
welcome.b2: Use AI Copilot for context-aware help

help.noPageTour: No guided tour is available on this page yet.

sidebar.title: Your firm workspace
sidebar.body: Use the sidebar to move between clients, matters, billing, documents, and more. Sections collapse to keep navigation tidy.

search.title: Global search
search.body: Search clients, matters, documents, and tasks from anywhere in the app.

commandPalette.title: Command palette
commandPalette.body: Press ⌘K (or Ctrl+K) to jump to any page, open Copilot, or start common actions like creating a matter.

copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.body: Ask Copilot questions in the context of your current page or matter. Use the sparkle button in the top bar or this floating button.

notifications.title: Notifications & alerts
notifications.body: Urgent deadlines, KYC items, billing alerts, and system messages appear here.

profile.title: Your account
profile.body: Open your profile menu to manage settings, view your role, and sign out.

help.title: Getting around
help.b1: Use the sidebar for main workflows and ⌘K for quick jumps.
help.b2: Copilot understands the page you are on—open it anytime you need guidance.
help.b3: Replay this tour from the Help menu in the top bar.

kpis.title: Firm snapshot
kpis.body: These cards summarize active matters, overdue tasks, leads, and revenue for the selected time window.

alerts.title: Urgent items
alerts.body: Review KYC gaps, trust approvals, and deadline risks that need attention today.

tasks.title: Your tasks
tasks.body: Tasks assigned to you appear here. Click through to update status or open the linked matter.

onboarding.title: Getting started checklist
onboarding.body: Complete these real setup steps—run AI search, add a client, open a matter—to activate your workspace.

help.title: Dashboard
help.b1: Switch Today / Week / Month to change KPI and task windows.
help.b2: Use Next Best Actions for AI-suggested priorities.
help.b3: Open any card to drill into matters, billing, or alerts.

search.title: Find clients
search.body: Search by name, email, or company. KYC badges show missing or expired documents.

create.title: Add a client
create.body: Create individual or company profiles. You can link matters after the client is saved.

list.title: Client directory
list.body: Click a row to open the client record, view matters, and manage portal access.

help.title: Clients
help.b1: Complete KYC before billing or trust transactions where required.
help.b2: Use Copilot on this page to draft intake notes or summarize client history.
help.b3: New clients can be converted from intake leads automatically.

form.title: Client details
form.body: Enter contact information and client type. Conflict checks run when you save.

submit.title: Save & continue
submit.body: After saving, open a matter or upload KYC documents from the client profile.

help.title: New client
help.b1: Individual vs company affects required fields and billing setup.
help.b2: You can invite the client to the portal after the profile is created.

header.title: Client profile
header.body: Contact details, KYC status, and quick actions live at the top of the record.

matters.title: Linked matters
matters.body: All cases for this client appear here. Open a matter to manage tasks, documents, and billing.

help.title: Client record
help.b1: Upload KYC documents and track expiry dates.
help.b2: Enable client portal access for secure messaging and document sharing.
help.b3: Create a new matter directly from this profile.

create.title: Open a matter
create.body: Start a new case, link it to a client, and assign team members.

filter.title: Filter & search
filter.body: Narrow by status, practice area, or assignee to find active work quickly.

list.title: Matter pipeline
list.body: Each row shows stage, deadline, and owner. Click to open the matter hub.

help.title: Matters
help.b1: Use playbooks to auto-generate tasks when a matter opens.
help.b2: Open the AI workbench from a matter for drafting and research.
help.b3: Track court deadlines and outcomes from matter sub-pages.

form.title: Matter setup
form.body: Link a client, choose practice area, and set the matter title and key dates.

submit.title: Create matter
submit.body: Saving creates the matter timeline and optional playbook tasks.

help.title: New matter
help.b1: Assign collaborators so they see tasks and documents immediately.
help.b2: Practice area drives templates, forms, and AI suggestions.

header.title: Matter hub
header.body: Overview of status, parties, key dates, and quick actions for this case.

tabs.title: Matter sections
tabs.body: Switch between timeline, documents, tasks, billing, and specialized tools.

workbench.title: AI workbench
workbench.body: Open the workbench for matter-scoped AI chat, drafting, and suggested next steps.

help.title: Matter detail
help.b1: Log time and expenses from the matter for accurate billing.
help.b2: Upload evidence and documents to the matter vault.
help.b3: Share read-only access with clients via the portal when ready.

create.title: Create tasks
create.body: Add deadlines, assign owners, and link tasks to matters.

list.title: Task queue
list.body: Filter by due date, priority, or assignee. Mark complete as work progresses.

help.title: Tasks
help.b1: Overdue tasks surface on your dashboard automatically.
help.b2: Automations can create tasks from playbooks and court deadlines.
help.b3: Use Copilot to summarize open tasks on a matter.

record.title: Record or import
record.body: Capture client meetings, depositions, or calls. Transcripts link to matters.

list.title: Meeting library
list.body: Browse recordings, transcripts, and AI summaries. Open any meeting to review notes.

help.title: Meetings
help.b1: Link recordings to matters for context in Copilot and drafting.
help.b2: Search transcripts from the command palette (⌘K).
help.b3: Export notes for client files or court submissions.

view.title: Calendar
view.body: See hearings, deadlines, and internal events in one view.

create.title: Add events
create.body: Create events and link them to matters so the team stays aligned.

help.title: Calendar
help.b1: Court deadlines from matters can appear here automatically.
help.b2: Share calendar visibility based on your role.

log.title: Log time
log.body: Record billable and non-billable hours against matters.

list.title: Time entries
list.body: Review and edit entries before pre-bill and invoicing.

help.title: Time tracking
help.b1: Accurate time logs feed pre-bill review.
help.b2: Use matter links so finance can invoice correctly.

upload.title: Upload documents
upload.body: Add firm files and associate them with clients or matters.

list.title: Document library
list.body: Browse, search, and open files. Version history is kept per document.

help.title: Documents
help.b1: Templates and generated drafts also appear here.
help.b2: Use Copilot document search to find clauses across files.

search.title: Law library
search.body: Search statutes and regulations for your jurisdiction with hybrid keyword + semantic search.

help.title: Law library
help.b1: Cite sources directly into matter drafts.
help.b2: Filter by jurisdiction to match your firm's primary country.

search.title: Firm vault
search.body: Semantic search across firm memory—past matters, memos, and diligence packs.

help.title: Vault
help.b1: Run bulk diligence queries across uploaded corpora.
help.b2: Results respect matter and client access controls.

create.title: E-signatures
create.body: Create signing envelopes, add signers, and track completion status.

help.title: E-sign
help.b1: Link envelopes to matters for audit trails.
help.b2: Clients can sign via secure email links.

hub.title: Billing hub
hub.body: Access invoices, pre-bill review, payments, and trust from one place.

help.title: Billing
help.b1: Run pre-bill before sending invoices to clients.
help.b2: Trust movements require approval per firm policy.

balances.title: Trust accounting
balances.body: Monitor client trust balances, pending approvals, and reconciliation.

help.title: Trust
help.b1: Never commingle trust and operating funds.
help.b2: Approval alerts appear on your dashboard when action is needed.

dashboard.title: Finance dashboard
dashboard.body: Track revenue, accounts receivable, and firm financial KPIs.

help.title: Finance
help.b1: Drill into invoices and payments from summary cards.
help.b2: Export reports for partners and accountants.

create.title: Log expenses
create.body: Record disbursements, attach receipts, and bill to matters where applicable.

help.title: Expenses
help.b1: Finance roles can approve expenses before invoicing.
help.b2: Link every expense to a matter for clean client billing.

inbox.title: Leads inbox
inbox.body: Review incoming intake leads. Qualify and convert qualified leads to clients and matters.

help.title: Leads
help.b1: Convert a lead in one step to pre-fill client and matter fields.
help.b2: Declined leads are archived for reporting.

list.title: Inbox
list.body: Messages and notifications that need a response appear here.

help.title: Inbox
help.b1: Distinguish client messages from system alerts.
help.b2: Mark items read to keep your queue clean.

list.title: Alerts
list.body: KYC gaps, compliance items, and urgent firm alerts are listed here.

help.title: Alerts
help.b1: Resolve KYC alerts before trust or billing actions.
help.b2: Critical alerts also appear on the dashboard strip.

wizard.title: Client intake
wizard.body: Walk through structured intake: issue classification, conflict check, and matter creation.

help.title: Intake
help.b1: Use for walk-in and phone intake—not only web leads.
help.b2: AI assists with issue classification and required documents.

query.title: AI Legal Search
query.body: Ask a legal question for your jurisdiction. Answers include citations you can verify.

results.title: Cited results
results.body: Save research to a matter or export citations into drafts.

help.title: Legal research
help.b1: Be specific about jurisdiction and fact pattern for better citations.
help.b2: AI usage counts against your firm's credit balance.
help.b3: Always verify citations before filing or advising clients.

invite.title: Team management
invite.body: Invite colleagues and assign roles that control access to billing, matters, and settings.

help.title: Team
help.b1: Roles determine sidebar visibility and Copilot permissions.
help.b2: Deactivate users instead of deleting to preserve audit history.

upload.title: Document templates
upload.body: Upload firm templates with merge variables (e.g. client name) for automated generation.

help.title: Templates
help.b1: Organize by practice area for faster drafting.
help.b2: Edit versions without losing history.

hub.title: Settings
hub.body: Configure users, billing, AI policy, integrations, and compliance from this hub.

help.title: Settings
help.b1: Only partner admins can change firm-wide governance.
help.b2: Review AI policy and data consent before enabling training features.

cases.title: Your cases
cases.body: See active legal cases and their status at a glance.

actions.title: Quick actions
actions.body: Check an issue, upload documents, view reports, or request a lawyer review.

help.title: Home
help.b1: AI credits power issue checks and document analysis.
help.b2: Open a case to message your lawyer or pay invoices.

list.title: Case list
list.body: Each case tracks documents, reports, messages, and payments in one place.

help.title: Cases
help.b1: Start a new issue check from the dashboard if you need a fresh case.
help.b2: Case status updates when your lawyer takes action.

tabs.title: Case sections
tabs.body: Switch between overview, documents, reports, messages, payments, and consent.

help.title: Case home
help.b1: Upload documents to help your lawyer understand the situation.
help.b2: Request lawyer review when you need formal advice.

plans.title: Plans & credits
plans.body: Choose a subscription or buy AI credit packs for issue checks and analysis.

help.title: Subscription
help.b1: Credits roll over according to your plan terms.
help.b2: Enable auto top-up to avoid interruptions.

hub.title: Account settings
hub.body: Manage profile, privacy, data consent, and notification preferences.

help.title: Settings
help.b1: Control how your data is used for AI features.
help.b2: Update contact details so your lawyer can reach you.
